title: After the Oaks: A Frenzied View

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Awaken… power of the saint…!!
Haaaaaah…!!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(Desire… that intensity…!
…It's pulling me in…!)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…But! I won't lose… no matter what!!
Haaaaaaaah…!!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: …!! Buena Vistaaaaaa!!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Hah… hah…!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
She has overcome Red Desire's intense drive!
This year's Queen of the Oaks is Buena Vista!
She has lived up to every bit of the crowd's
expectations!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Buena Vistaaaaa!
Congratulations!!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
That… that was incredible…!
It lived up to the hype… no, it was even better
than expected!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
And Desire, wasn't she even stronger than
before!? In most years, she totally could've
taken the Double Tiara!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Buena's strength is also so consistent…
Wow… the Shuka Sho is gonna be insane!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, if Buena keeps going like this…
don't you think she could actually win the
Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, wow…!
How do you even choose between those!?
Buena's just too exciting!!

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text: …Still… You would say it is not enough…?

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
Or perhaps… because this is the stage where
the one you admire once triumphed? …No, that
alone cannot explain it. Which means—

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
—You, too, truly bear Schwarz within you.
Just as I do… That is why distance does not
hinder you. Once you draw that close… you
can feel it.

text_block_list.name: Red Desire
text_block_list.text:
In that case, the place I must aim for is…
the Shuka Sho. With my perfected self…
this time, I will reach it.

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl A
text_block_list.text:
…Desire… she's not shaken at all.
She's still going to challenge someone that
strong…?

text_block_list.name: Horsegirl B
text_block_list.text:
…We can't afford to lose either.
We all have something we refuse to give up!!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Ohhhhhhh…!!)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(All that heat… all that excitement…
everyone's fighting spirit… I can feel it.
My heart's swelling up…!)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…?
Just now, was that…

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text:
Buenaaa!!
Keep doing your best from here on out too!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Ah…!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Everyone, thank you so much for all your
support today!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I'm so happy I was able to live up to it!
And in the final race, the Shuka Sho, I'll run
with everything I have!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: I'm back, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Yeah!
And thank you for believing in me!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Hey… we're really doing great right now,
aren't we?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Everyone's getting more and more excited for
the Shuka Sho…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
And if we win the Shuka Sho…
I feel like an incredible view is waiting for us!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yeah… we will!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At that moment, something about Buena Vista's
demeanor felt slightly off to me.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Whew…
Whew…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…Whew.
…Whew…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her lips purse slightly as she takes shallow
breaths. It's a habit I've seen countless times
since we were kids… the way she acts
whenever she's feeling uneasy.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Huh?
Worried…?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Hmm…?
Not really…?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
I-I'm really not!
Sorry… I honestly can't think of anything…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Or… was there actually something I should be
worried about?
choice_data_list: No, nothing like that at all…

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Buena Vista genuinely looks troubled. It doesn't
seem like she's lying or trying to dodge the
question. If she's not even aware of it herself…
choice_data_list: (Then all I can do is wait…?)

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
There's no way you'd mistake something about
me, Trainer… so what am I anxious about…?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: …Now I'm starting to feel anxious…
choice_data_list: Sorry, just forget I said anything!!
Sorry, just forget I said anything!!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
When I get back to the dorm, I'll take some
time and think about it properly.
choice_data_list: No, get some rest today first.
No, get some rest today first.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
…That's true, the race just ended.
I'll make sure to relax and recharge!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Then… I guess we'll continue tomorrow.
Let's do our best for the Shuka Sho!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Hehe.
Thanks, Trainer♪

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: Yaaawn～…

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
(Trainer said that too… It's a little early, but
I guess I'll head to bed—)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: (Woahhhhhhh…!!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
"Buena Vistaaaa!!"
"I won't lose…!"
"Can't wait for the next one!"
"Uoooooh…!!" "Run—!!"

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text: But, I need to think about the race.

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
The marking's definitely going to be even
tighter in the Shuka Sho. I need the strength
to break through even if I get boxed in!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right. Summer camp's coming up soon!
It'll be the perfect chance to improve even
more… I've gotta give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
The Shuka Sho is at Kyoto Racecourse, right?
I need to memorize the course layout perfectly…

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text: …My.

text_block_list.name: Gentildonna
text_block_list.text:
So you're still awake. I believe you said you
were going to sleep immediately?

text_block_list.name: Buena Vista
text_block_list.text:
Ah! It's already this late…!?
I'm going to bed right now, good night…!
